title: Schema Migration + API Bug Fix
api_changes: ContentItem dataclass: Added fields subtype, summary, managed_fields, external_id
add() method: Fixed critical bug - changed 'type' to 'content_type' in INSERT statement
add() method: Added parameters subtype, summary, managed_fields, external_id
add() method: INSERT now includes all v5 fields with ON CONFLICT updates
search() method: Added subtype parameter for filtering
_row_to_item(): Now maps v5 fields from database rows

test_results.add_with_v5_fields: PASS - Created item with subtype, summary, managed_fields
test_results.retrieval_v5_fields: PASS - All v5 fields correctly retrieved

notes_for_orchestrator: The critical add() bug (using 'type' instead of 'content_type') was fixed. This was causing inserts to fail silently or write to wrong column. The database already had content_type column from v4, so migration only added new v5 columns. Migration script is idempotent and safe to re-run. W3.2 (Enrichment Engine) and W3.3 (Smart Retrieval) can now proceed - they depend on subtype being available for filtering.
